text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O is in search of a rival<n>before the
Satsuki Sho comes.<n>However...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Alas, how can this be? Why will no<n>one take on
the role of my rival?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Worthy adversaries are vital to a<n>good opera!
Truly, does no one wish<n>to become my Count
Friedrich and try<n>to defeat me?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What reason is there to refuse?<n>"Death by
embarrassment," I'm told,<n>but such is the price of
standing<n>before my radiance!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: It's incomprehensible! Do you not<n>agree, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I try my best to sound convincing, but<n>I'm certain
they all just don't want to<n>deal with Opera O.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Opera O... I'm, er, sorry...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Really, Doto? No luck?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I tried to speak with everyone who<n>might race in
the Satsuki Sho... to ask<n>them to be your rival, but...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
They were all so intimidating... I<n>couldn't work up
the courage to talk.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: What?! You surrendered beforeextending the invitation?! Humility isnot that virtuous, Doto!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Wait, Trainer. One Umamusume with<n>the skill to
enter the Satsuki Sho yet<n>remains.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But for whatever reason, I cannot<n>seem to find
said candidate. Why will<n>she not show her face?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
There... Made it out without a hitch.<n>Now, while it's
still early...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: O-oooh! Finally!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: You are the one I've been looking for!<n>Also...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You are the devoted fan who<n>attended my dinner
show at my last<n>year-end party!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: B-be serious... I just happened by...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Word has reached my ears.<n>Apparently, you are
almost certain to<n>run in the Satsuki Sho, yes?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Perfect! Would you like to skip three<n>levels of
fandom and become my<n>rival?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You are the only one left capable of<n>the role of my
adversary, o beautiful<n>Admire Vega!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I wouldn't say I'm beautiful...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I feel somehow connected to you!<n>That's why I
must somehow settle<n>this score!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Geez. All you do is push and nag.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Opera O doesn't let up the pressure.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, to confer the honor of being<n>selected as my
rival.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Read my lips... N-O. Now leave me<n>alone.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I see, dear rival of mine. Or, ma<n>rivale, if you
prefer French.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't care less, and I'm not<n>doing it either
way.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Umm... Opera O? I think Ayabe might<n>be serious.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha, however do you mean,<n>Doto? Surely you
only observe with<n>your eyes.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Close them—and plug your ears aswell. Reach out with your heart.Then it will become clear as day thatshe is overjoyed.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Or you could just listen to me!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega fails to get through to<n>Opera O who
insists the conversation<n>go in one direction.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But... why don't you understand? You<n>might say
this and that, but at the end<n>of the day, you will still
race in the<n>Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
In which case, you will be running<n>against me.
Does that not already<n>make you my rival?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Or... could it be? Are you planning to<n>withdraw?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I, well... Ngh...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I'm... going to run. I have my own<n>goal I'm
chasing.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ah, splendid! Then we do, in fact,<n>have a rivalry!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
May it be a fruitful one, dear Admire<n>Vega—no...
Ayabe!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... I avoided her for so long... only<n>to get caught
at the very end.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And that is how Admire Vega is,<n>reluctantly, cast
as the rival for the<n>Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Having acquired the competition she<n>wanted, T.M.
Opera O's motivation<n>skyrockets!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Your ability to twist an arm is<n>amazing, Opera O...
But... I wonder if you went too far.
